settings.title_help: Optional. Shown above the body. Leave blank for no header.
settings.icon_help: FontAwesome class shown next to the title (e.g. fas fa-bullhorn). Leave blank for no icon.
settings.body_help: Raw HTML, sanitised before display -- script tags, event-handler attributes, javascript: URLs, and unsafe elements such as iframes are removed.
settings.background_help: Optional. The widget's background color. Leave blank to follow your theme.
